title: Gambeya azaguieana
taxonomy: Gambeya azaguieana is classified as a species within the family Sapotaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the sapote family. This family is part of the order Ericales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Ebenaceae, Gomortegaceae, and others. The Sapotaceae family is native to tropical Africa and Asia, with many species being used for their edible fruits. Gambeya azaguieana is a part of this family due to its characteristics and evolutionary history. The classification of Gambeya azaguieana helps scientists understand its relationships with other plants and its unique features.
